publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-08-31 18:15:03 -0400.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Includes correspondence, bulletins, membership lists, reports, minutes, financial records, questionnaires, records of conventions, and histories, newsletters, and related records, as well as tape recordings.
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, bulletins, membership lists, reports, minutes, financial records, questionnaires, records of conventions, and histories of Sigma Delta Epsilon and its chapters, newsletters, and related records. Also, tape recordings of Grand Chapter meeting, National Council meeting, and 65th Anniversary speeches, 1986.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Sigma Delta Epsilon is a sorority for graduate women in science.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, bulletins, membership lists, reports, minutes, financial records, questionnaires, records of conventions, and histories of Sigma Delta Epsilon and its chapters, newsletters, and related records. Also, tape recordings of Grand Chapter meeting, National Council meeting, and 65th Anniversary speeches, 1986.
Charter for the establishment of a chapter at Iowa State College, 1925.
Proclamations for "Women in Science Week," from the Governor of Massachusetts and the Mayor of Boston, June 7-13, 2004.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. National Council, Minutes and Correspondence Box 1
Series II. Reports to National Council Box 2
Series III. Folders on Deceased or Honorary Members, National Newsletters, National Membership Rosters, Minutes of National Meetings Box 3
Series IV. Histories of Individual Chapters, Minutes of National Meetings Box 4
Series V. Current and Historical Material Box 45
Series VI. Copies of Publications, Bulletins and Newsletters Box 6-9
Series VIII. Items Added October 1, 1987 Box 10
Series IX. Items Added November 21, 1992 Box 10

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Sigma Delta Epsilon records, #3605. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. National Council, Minutes and Correspondence
"Personnel - National Council" Lists of national officers
"Personnel of National Committees" Lists of national committees and committee member
"SDE 1968 National Council Grand Chapter Membership Roster" Reports, list of members by chapter
"SDE 1968 Grand Chapter Meeting Membership Roster" Reports, lists of members by chapter

"1968 National Meetings" Includes 3 smaller folders. "SDE 1968 National Council Grand Chapter Membership Roster" Reports, lists of members by chapter 1968; "Sigma Delta Epsilon" Report by auditor 1967/1968 ; Untitled folder containing reports, questionnaires, correspondence, lists of members in 1968. Loose material includes minutes, reports, lists and agenda for Kansas City meetings

"1967 Council Meetings" Includes 3 smaller folders, "1967 Grand Chapter Meeting" of reports, minutes, budget, notes 1967; "Sigma Delta Epsilon" Report of auditor 1966/1967 ; "1967 National Council Meetings" Minutes, reports 1967
"1966 December National council Meetings" Minutes, reports, budget transcription, lists 1966
"1966 Grand Chapter Meeting" Budget, minutes, reports, newsletter, pamphlet, notes, photograph 1966
"1966 National Council and Board of Directors Meetings August 20-21, 1966 ": Correspondence, minutes, list of members, report of accountant.
"National Council and Grand Chapter Meetings, 1965" Minutes, report, notes concerning meeting in
"1964 Convention, Montreal" Report by accountant correspondence, sketch (historical), newsletter, minutes, lists,
"1963 Convention, Cleveland, Ohio" Report of accountant, committee reports, notes, minutes,
"1963 Interim Board Meeting" Correspondence, minutes, schedule,
"1962 Convention, Philadelphia, Pa. Photograph, agenda, lists, reports of committees,
"1962 Interim Board Meetings" list of officers, committees, correspondence, questionnaire,
"Tea in Denver - AAAS - 1961" Clipping, correspondence, minutes of AAAS council meeting, list of participating members,
"1961 Convention, Lafayette, Indiana" Correspondence, list of officers and committees, speech, reports, bulletin of American Institute of Biological Sciences,
"1960 Convention, New York, New York" Minutes, lists of officers and committees, reports, correspondence,
"1959 Convention, Chicago, Ill." Minutes, lists of officers and committees, reports, correspondence,
"1958 Convention, Washington D.C." lists of officers and committee members, notes from meeting, minutes, reports, agenda, correspondence,
"1958 Convention, Washington, D. C. MLR File" Correspondence, minutes, schedule, pamphlet on the meeting,
"1957 Convention, Indianapolis, Indiana" Correspondence, reports, minutes, pamphlet,
"1956 Convention - New York, N.Y." Minutes, schedule, correspondence, lists of members
"1955 Convention, Minneapolis, Minneapolis" Minutes, correspondence, lists of officers and committees, list of members,
"1954 Convention - Gainesville, Florida." Lists of officers, committees, minutes, schedule of meeting,
"1953 Convention - Madison, Wisconsin" Correspondence, minutes, reports,
"1952 Convention - Ithaca, N.Y." Correspondence, minutes, reports, bulletin,
"1951 Convention, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania" Correspondence, list of members attending minutes, reports,

"1950 Convention - Cleveland, Ohio" Meeting schedule, minutes, reports, correspondence 1950. Accompanying material contains compiled minutes of conventions to end of 1938, correspondence and reports concerning fellowships,
"National Council Meetings Minutes, agenda, correspondence, reports,
Series II. Reports to National Council
"SDE officers" in larger folder. "Officers" Lists, reports of committees;
"Alpha: Officers and Members" Correspondence, lists of officers and members, questionnaires;
"Beta: Officers and Members" Correspondence, questionnaires, lists of officers and members;
"Gamma: Officers and Members" Correspondence, questionnaires, lists;
"Delta: Officers and Members" Correspondence, questionnaires lists;
Epsilon: Officers and Members" Correspondence, questionnaires lists;
"Zeta: Officers and Members" Correspondence, lists, questionnaires;
"Eta: Officers and Members" Correspondence, lists, questionnaires;
"Theta: Officers and Members" Correspondence, lists, questionnaires;
"Iota: Officers and Members" Correspondence, lists, questionnaires;
"Kappa: Officers and Members" Correspondence, lists, questionnaires;
"Lambda: Officers and Members" Correspondence, lists, questionaires;
"Nu: Officers and Members" Correspondence, lists questionnaires;
"Xi: Officers and Members" Correspondence, Lists, questionnaires;
"Omicron: Officers and Members" Correspondence, Lists, questionnaires;
"Pi: Officers and Members" Correspondence, Lists, questionnaires;
"Rho: Officers and Members" Correspondence, Lists, questionnaires;
"Sigma: Officers and Members" Correspondence, lists, questionaires;
Series III. Folders on Deceased or Honorary Members, National Newsletters, National Membership Rosters, Minutes of National Meetings
A. History of S.D.E 1921-1971, 4 notebooks of early history
Sigma Delta Epsilon Graduate Women's Scientific Fraternity The Beginnings
Draft of history of Sigma Delta Epsilon
F. Photographs --- honorary members and presidents. (15 folders)
Series IV. Histories of Individual Chapters, Minutes of National Meetings
J. Historical Material Compiled for Golden Anniversary History including the program from the event,
1 binder, includes Certificate of Amendment of the Certifcate of Incorporation
Grand Chapter Meeting Minutes for January and June Meetings,
Grand Chapter Meeting Minutes for February Meeting,
Grand Chapter Meeting Minutes for February and June Meetings,
Grand Chapter Meeting Minutes, Chapter Reports and "A History of Sigma Delta Epsilon" edited by Mary Louise Robbins
Grand Chapter Meeting Minutes and program from the June event,
Series V. Current and Historical Material
Pictures and Tributes to Early Members and Charter Members
Charter Members 1921 and list of Charter Members living in 1970.
History of Chapters by Historical Committee 1966 (Lois Fogelsanger, Alpha)
Pictures and Program of 50th Anniversary celebration of Founding SDE held
History of Paleontological Research Institute (1932-1982) by Katherine V.W. Palmer
Material on the Griswold Memorial Fund at the Cornell University Plantations Established
History of the Paleontological Research Institute (1932-1982) by Katherine V.W. Palmer (clippings included)
Chapter Honorary Membership, 1978 , Frank H.T. Rhodes
Installation ceremony for officers, duties of officers, and the Badge
Federation of Organization for Professional Women (FOPW),
50th Anniversary Meeting, June 1971 in Ithaca, N.Y. Alpha, Hostess chapter
Annual Reports and minutes of Secretary
Reactivation Correspondence with National and chapters,
Early History: 1921-1942 2nd copy (1st copy in C.U. Archives of National)
Early History: Housekeeping and bookkeeping accounts of 1927 War Bond Purchase (1944), SDE House 502 Dryden Road
Early Constitutions: Before 1932 Revised 1932 (other copies in C.U. Archives)
Laua A. Minns: Certificate of Membership 1921, Memorials to Miss Minns, Her notes on expenses for Dryden Road House
Grand Chapter Meeting Kits: May 1985 Los Angeles, May 1986 Philadelphia
History: Explanation of SDE Emblem designed by V.Graham, Alpha explanation by M. Ellis, Delta
Margery Carleson (1892-1985) Member of SDE and founder of Illinois Chapter of Nature Conservancy, Articles and pictures
Alice S. Rossi Article: Women in Science: Why so few? Reprint from Science, May 28, 1965 Vol. 148, No. 3674 Pages 1196-1202
Alice S. Rossi Article: Women Scientists: Problems and Prospects, Paper delivered to conference on Women in Science. The Wisconsin Center, Madison Wisconsin,
Professional Skills Roster: Articles from Ithaca Journal on Roster Closing,
Material for National Archives: Received from National Secretary, Ethaline Cortelyou
Founding of Alpha Alpha Chapter: Burlington, Vermont
Forms--Samples: Election to affiliate membership, National Honorary Membership
Honorary Members: Recommendations, Nominations and Vitae
Honorary Members: Deceased Dr. Shirley Quimby Oct. 7, 1984 ; Dr. Anna Young Whiting
Incorporation: Articles of Incorporation 1922 , Amendment to Article 1971 , Title IX regulation
Membership Lists: (In separate bindings) 1966-1968, 1970-1975, 1978-1979, 1979-1980, 1980-1981 (Xi only), 1985 Complete, Some chapter members missing in earlier years.
National Office: 1976-1980 Washington, D.C. Procedure Manual, Interoffice memos, hours worked
National Officers: of SDE/GWIS listed from
White House Letter: List of Reagan female appointments
Series VI. Copies of Publications, Bulletins and Newsletters
Name Changed to Sigma Delta Epsilon Graduate Women in Science BULLETIN

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From the summer of 1969 (Vol. 1) through 1979 (Vol. IX) Newsletters were published in addition to Bulletins. Purpose of Newsletters as to fill a communication gap between spring and fall publications. However, this schedule was changed during those years.
When Helen Haller became Editor, she incorporated the numbering system into the Bulletin numberings.

did.unittitle: June, 1971 Ithaca, New York; December - Philadelphia
June, 1974 Leavenworth, Kansas; February - San Francisco
June, 1975 College Park , Maryland; January - New York City
June, 1980 Arlington, Virginia; January - San Francisco (Minutes only)
June, 1981 Ithaca, New York; January - Toronto (Minutes only)
June, 1982 St. Paul, Minneapolis; January - Washington (Minutes only)
May, 1984 New York, New York (Placed in archives January 18, 1985)
May, 1985 Los Angeles, California (Included in archives 'current' 1987)
Grand Chapter Meeting reports prior to 1970

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These are not in separate kits by years. The reports are usually brief and have been filed in groups in folders

did.unittitle: 1948 Reports from officers and committees-- apparently no meeting held.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The following items were deposited in the Cornell University Library Archives by the National Organization of Sigma Delta Epsilon, Graduate Women in Science.

did.unittitle: Minutes of National Council Meeting and Grand Chapter Meeting

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: May 24-25 1986 International House Philadelphia, Penn. Contents are Typed Copies and Tapes

National Honorary Awards 1987 : Recommendations, Vitae, Publications

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Dr. Rita Colwell, Dr. Barbara McClintock, Dr. Theressa Campbell Stadtman

did.unittitle: Kit From Grand Chapter Meeting: June 24-28, 1987 Macalester College St. Paul Minnesota

Margaret Pittman, Article by Gail McBride "Down to a 40-hour work-week." from Bulletin of Medical Alumni Assoc., Medicine on the Midway, University of Chicago Spring 1987. (Award from SDE Jan. 1986 to Margaret Pittman, See page 8 of article)
Vi and Mam: The lives of Viola Louise Sommermeyer and Carrie Murray by Karl H. Sommermeyer

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The following items were deposited in the Cornell University Library Archives by the National Organization of Sigma Delta Epsilon, Graduate Women in Science.

did.unittitle: Various: Wyckoff, Pittman, Horde, Diller, Mead, Bunting, Cooper, Chase, Wind, Quimby, Webster, Geray, Lonsdale, Kittnell, young, Reid, McWhinnie, Horstmann, Chu, Metz, Piccard, Apgar, Laucefield, Reynolds, Whiting
